definition: Courses focused on communication, interpersonal skills, leadership, teamwork, and workplace readiness.
Courses to improve grammar, speaking, writing, vocabulary, pronunciation, and overall English proficiency.
Courses covering resume writing, interview preparation, aptitude, and workplace readiness.
Courses on startup fundamentals, business planning, innovation, and entrepreneurial skills.
Courses on SEO, social media marketing, content marketing, email marketing, advertising, and analytics.
Courses covering programming, networking, databases, software development, and IT fundamentals.
Courses on AI, machine learning, data analytics, generative AI, and data science.
Courses related to healthcare, medicine, nursing, allied health sciences, and medical technology.
Courses in civil engineering, architecture, building technology, and infrastructure development.
Courses covering accounting, taxation, financial management, banking, auditing, and investments.
